# Verification Brief

Use this brief to author a claims, evidence, and independence challenge packet
with explicit unresolved-support posture.

- claim 1
- claim 2

[What invariants or bounded checks must stay true while challenging the claims?]

## Contract Assumptions
[What interface, invariant, or behavioral contract is assumed by the current claim set?]

## Verification Outcome
[What is the immediate outcome of the current challenge pass?]
Status: supported | unsupported

## Open Findings

- follow-up 1

## Out of Scope
- anything this packet is not trying to prove
